mapper.select: SELECT id,user_id,branch_id,points,description,created_at FROM points WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(points),0) FROM points WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT m.id AS userId, m.username AS username, pb.name AS branchName, COALESCE(SUM(p.points), 0) AS totalPoints FROM members m LEFT JOIN points p ON p.user_id = m.id LEFT JOIN party_branches pb ON pb.id = m.branch_id GROUP BY m.id, m.username, pb.name ORDER BY totalPoints DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO points(user_id, branch_id, points, description, created_at) VALUES(#{userId}, #{branchId}, #{points}, #{description}, #{createdAt})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM points WHERE description LIKE CONCAT('完成任务：', #{taskTitle})
